title: Actions & Visuals
description: Vanilla friendly pack Inspired by Actions & Stuff that improves minecraft's visuals and animations making them feel vibrant.
body:
**This is your standart vanilla friendly modpack that upgrades minecraft's visual aspects and animations to make it feel more vibrant.**

### **+Get the pack to the current milestone for the next update: 1250-Downloads**

**IMPORTANT : This pack is still in heavy development and optimization progress. Some texturepacks like Visual Effects+ may cause lag spikes but can be turned of in minecraft's resourcepack configuration.**![Lush cave](https://i.postimg.cc/jdNN75MX/2026-04-16-22-50-48.png)

Major Thanks to the creators of this packs:
- [Fresh Outlines](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-outlines)
- [Re-Shaded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/re-shaded)
- [Visual Effects+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-effects-plus)

This pack was heavily inspired by _Actions & Stuff_ And other similar packs.
And thank you to Enderverse, Dimaxxed, AsianHalfSquat and others for some of the mod recommendations.


<details>
<summary>Help/Bug reports</summary>

_If you find any bugs or issues make sure to let me know on my youtube by leaving a comment or contact me on discord: lavagasteryt_

</details>
